landing.title: Fathom Analytics: A Better Google Analytics Alternative
landing.text:
Fathom Analytics: A Better Google Analytics Alternative
Skip to main content
Product
Why Fathom
Pricing
Resources
The Google Analytics Alternative
Why you should ditch Google Analytics
No cookies & GDPR compliant
Actionable insights while staying compliant with privacy laws
About us
100% independently owned, zero VC pressure
Help Center & Docs
API
Blog
Changelog
Status
Free trial
Login
Pricing
Free trial
Log in
Menu
A Google Analytics alternative that’s simple & privacy-first
New
Saved Views
Ditch complex, intrusive web analytics for Fathom - a better Google Analytics alternative. Experience ease of use, forever data retention, and complete, worry-free GDPR compliance - all while protecting
your time
and your visitors'
digital privacy
.
Start free trial
View a live demo
Quick setup
Free 7-day trial
No obligation
Analytics for Huberman Lab are solely powered by Fathom. It's such a pleasure to use compared to Google Analytics. There's just the right number of features, and their platform is incredibly intuitive.
Ian Mackey, Huberman Lab
Trusted by IBM, GitHub, Tailwind & over a million websites
Ditch Google Analytics
At Fathom, we strongly believe that analytics tools should be insightful, not invasive. This is why we created a privacy-focused, simple software tool that offers valuable insights without the complexity.
Get setup in minutes
Our script is
a single line of code
that works with any website, CMS or framework. Set up in minutes and start collecting real-time data without prior technical knowledge. Our
analytics software
is designed to be easily understood instantly.
Comply with privacy laws
We've hired the best lawyers and legal minds worldwide to ensure our simple analytics software is
fully compliant
with GDPR, CCPA, ePrivacy, PECR and more, providing essential insights into traffic sources without compromising privacy.
See more accurate data
Our real-time analytics blocks bots, scrapers and spam traffic—showing you only real, human visits. This gives you the flexibility to collect data for (and only pay for) exactly the data you want to see and make decisions about.
Say no to cookie banners
Fathom
anonymizes IP addresses
and other visitor data
without using cookies
. That means you don't have to clutter your site or slow it down with cookie consent banners and notices for your site's analytics.
Join the movement
Thousands of companies, including Fortune 100s, pioneers of the Open Web, and governments, have
switched from Google Analytics
to Fathom for ease of use, better privacy, and more accurate metrics.
Different. In a good way.
For a long time, web analytics tools have been seriously broken. Pages upon pages of reports to click. Training and certifications required. And, worst of all, it was offered for “free,” so tech companies could profit wildly from all of our personal data.
Our software is something quite different. Our software protects your time and your visitors' digital privacy.
Wow, what a
breath of fresh air
. I love how simple Fathom is, and it really gives you all the traffic metrics you could need.
Joel Gascoigne
CEO of Buffer
I switched to Fathom because it’s an ethical analytics tool
that I trust
. It gives me everything I want to know about my site's performance.
Charli Marie
Creative director of ConvertKit
I consider Fathom a
must have
tool if you want to understand what's happening with your website traffic—it's simple, speedy, and accurate.
Ruben Gamez
Founder Signwell & Bidsketch
After switching to Fathom for my web properties, I find I'm more
attentive
to my sites because I'm always aware of how many people are on them and which pages are most popular.
Caleb Porzio
Creator of Alpine.js
They are the best Google Analytics alternative who
really care
about privacy and simplicity. Fathom’s simple dashboard with clear metrics makes it easy to understand what's happening across all web properties.
Jessica Joyce
SEO Expert
Fathom is a great Google Analytics alternative because it is focused on protecting visitors’ privacy and does not bog down loading times, leading to
faster websites
with
better SEO
.
Nathalie Lussier
Founder of AccessAlly.com
Getting started is simple and easy
Gain valuable insights into your website or web application in just a few steps. And, if you get stuck,
our support team
is always on hand to help you get things up and running.
Step 1
Sign up for an account
Start with a 7-day free trial. Then
pricing starts at $15/month
.
Step 2
Add our script
It’s a single line of code that works with every site, web app and CMS.
Step 3
See your stats
Watch the dashboard fill up in real time.
Our features
How Fathom works
Features you need, no training required
Event tracking
Use custom events to collect user interactions like newsletter sign-ups, link + button clicks or ecommerce sales, and get valuable insights for optimizing your campaigns.
Get detailed reports
Send email reports every week or month so that you can keep track of your metrics without logging in.
Campaigns & newsletters
Use UTMs to collect data on how much traffic your campaigns generate and see how well they convert into revenue.
Keep data forever
That means 20 years from now, customers can still see their data from the day they first started using our software.
Great for your SEO
Our script is lightweight and fast-loading, meaning switching from Google Analytics to Fathom won't hurt your SEO rankings in any way.
Handle any traffic spikes
If an A-list influencer shares your site on social media or your blog post goes viral, your analytics won't slow down or get shut off.
We're happily
Big
Small Tech
We're a small but mighty team and we don't need (or want) funding or investors. The only people we answer to are our customers.
Designed for developers
Our API is easy to use and so powerful we use it ourselves to load data onto customer dashboards in our software.
Integrate with the tools and tech stack you already use
Fathom integrates with everything. Seriously. Our lightweight script is just 2kB in your source code. You can add it to any CMS, framework or technology you're already using. From content management systems like WordPress to progressive frameworks like Next.JS and Vue.JS to other software like ConvertKit, we've got your covered.
Even if you don't see a plugin or integration here, since our embed process is so simple, you can add our analytics script to anything.
See all our of integrations
Trusted by 1,000,000+ websites and counting
Companies worldwide, from startups to the biggest corporations, have switched to Fathom Analytics for its reliability, ease of use and focus on privacy. Our software is a simple and private
Google Analytics alternative
that takes a few minutes to set up and use.
Our new Vue.js website has been using Fathom because I like how it’s
lightweight
and respects user privacy.
Evan You
Creator of Vue.js
Fathom simplifies the task of analyzing site performance while simultaneously respecting my visitors' privacy. Also, it’s a joy to use.
Jon Henshaw
Founder of Coywolf
Today, so many big tech corps are abusing our privacy. This is why I use Fathom. They’re an analytics company
I can trust
.
Justin Jackson
Cofounder of Transistor
I value my time and my website visitors'
right to digital privacy
. That’s why I’ve switched to Fathom.
Marshall Shorts
Founder of Artfluential
Privacy-protections aside, I love the
beautifully simple
interface. Fathom is now part of my default stack.
Derrick Reimer
Founder of SavvyCal
I’m
deeply opposed
to cookie banners. Using Fathom means I don't have to compromise my morals.
Ben Orenstein
Cofounder of Tuple
Ready to simplify your analytics?
Start your free trial, import your GA data, and keep every future visit. Cookie‑free and clutter‑free.
Start a 7-day, unlimited free trial to see how simple analytics can be.
Get started
Check out our full-featured, live demo to see how our software works.
Live demo
We've counted billions of pageviews for thousands of customers, all without ever compromising anyone's digital privacy. We hope you'll
join us
.
2018-2026

Simple and sustainable pricing
Get the information you need about your website without compromising anyone’s digital privacy. Start with a 7-day free trial of Fathom and then pay a fair and sustainable monthly price based on your average monthly page views.
Pay monthly

  Analytics
After switching to Fathom for my web properties, I find I'm more attentive to my sites because I'm always
        aware of how many people are on them and which pages are most popular.
Caleb Porzio
Creator of Alpine.js
Wow, what a breath of fresh air. I love how simple Fathom Analytics is, and it really gives you all the
        traffic metrics you could need.
Joel Gascoigne
CEO of Buffer
Fathom Analytics is a great Google Analytics alternative because it is focused on protecting visitors’
        privacy and does not bog down loading times, leading to faster websites.
Nathalie Lussier
Founder of AccessAlly.com
Frequently asked questions (and answers)
Will you do a pre-sales call or live demo for us?
We unfortunately don't offer live demos or do calls in our sales process. That said, our software is ridiculously easy to use and you can watch a
10 minute video demo
or click around on
our live demo
. Every
feature is documented
and you can even give our software a 7-day free trial (run it alongside your existing analytics). Of course, if you need help or have specific questions, we're here
via email
—just let us know how we can be of assistance.
Do you have a lower/free option?
Nope, and here’s why: we’ve heavily invested in enterprise-level infrastructure with great speed and reliability (we don’t just host our software on cheap VPS servers that go offline). Our business model is selling software, not your data. So we’ve priced for long-term sustainability of our company. That way we can offer our product for a very long time (forever).
Do you ever do sales or discounts?
Never. Not even for Black Friday. So rest assured, the price you are seeing today or are paying in your account currently is the best price EVER. We’ve never done discounts, nor will we ever. We feel this is fair, because everyone pays the exact same price.
What happens if I hit my pageview limit?
We’ll never turn your analytics off for occasional traffic spikes or if a payment fails the first time (hey, this has happened to all of us at least once). Instead, if you go over for two months in a row, we’ll let you know we’re upgrading you. From there, you can decide to stay or cancel your account (no hard feelings either way).
Can I switch to a different pageview limit?
Of course! If you exceed your pageview limits for two months in a row, we’ll offer to do that for you. Or, if you’re under your current tier for two months in a row (and it’s not our lowest tier already), you can downgrade from within our billing settings.
How many sites does my plan include?
Every plan includes at least 50 sites, and the bigger pageview plans include more (75 on the 1M plan, scaling up to hundreds on the largest plans). You’ll see the exact number for each plan in the
pricing table
. If you need more than your plan includes, you can add sites yourself in packs of 50 for $10/month each (or $100/year, which gets you two months free) from your billing settings. Need to go really big?
Get in touch
and we’ll sort you out.
What if I want to cancel my account or trial?
We’re not interested in having someone’s money if they aren’t happy. So if you want to cancel your account at any point, you can do so right from your settings - you don’t even have to call or email us (unless you have a question). There are no contracts, meaning you can cancel anytime (with a complete data export).
Does custom event tracking count as pageviews?
Yes. If you decide to use our custom event tracking system on your website or use our API, those requests will be counted as if they were pageviews.
What if I have another question?
Reach out
! We will be happy to help with any pre-sales questions.
We've counted billions of pageviews for thousands of customers, all without ever compromising anyone's digital privacy. We hope you'll
join us
.
2018-2026
Fathom Analytics.

Jun 26, 2026
More Sites On Bigger Plans
Bigger plans now include more sites for free, and you can add extra yourself in packs of 50 for $10/month. No email required.
Read more

A better Partners program
Earn 25% lifetime commissions with source keywords, flexible payouts, and a new Partners dashboard.

Saved Views
Save your most-used filter combinations and switch between them in a single click.

.
Find a help article:
Popular searches:
exporting
,
ecommerce conversions
,
WordPress
Getting started
Learn how to setup your account, how our dashboard works, and how to install our script (it's easy, don't worry).
Explore these 9 articles
Your account
Add and delete sites, billing and upgrading, closing an account, and using your affiliate URL to generate revenue.
Explore these 9 articles
Script settings
How to embed and customize our script on your site, exclude your own visits, and control where data is collected.
Explore these 7 articles
Features
Learn how to use all our features, including: email reports, GA importer, using filters, exports and much more.
Explore these 13 articles
Event conversions
Use Fathom's events to track conversions, 404 pages, form submissions, button clicks, and more.
Explore these 7 articles
Troubleshooting
Can't get Fathom working, want to change your domain name, or aren't sure why stats are different between GA and Fathom? Try here.
Explore these 17 articles
Integrations
Fathom Analytics integrates with almost all CMS' and frameworks, like: WordPress, Webflow, Next.js, GTM and so much more.
Explore these 38 articles
API documentation
The Fathom Analytics API allows you to take complete control of your Fathom account through your own software.
Explore our API
Most popular support articles

WordPress integration
Shopify integration
Google Analytics importer

please reach out to us
and we'll happily get things sorted out for you.

We've counted billions of pageviews for thousands of customers, all without ever compromising anyone's digital privacy. We hope you'll
join us
.

Integrations
Fathom Analytics works great with lots of content management software and developer frameworks.
If you don't see a CMS or framework below, it doesn't mean we don't support it, it just means we haven't documented it yet (so let us know!) Fathom is
a single line of code
embedded on any website or application, so we've not come across anything we can't integrate easily with.

hits.title: We Rebuilt Fathom Analytics from the ground up and moved to Laravel Vapor
Plausible and Fathom analytics are not GDPR compliant
From almost shutting down Fathom Analytics to tripling our MRR
I quit my job to work on Fathom Analytics full time
How accurate are privacy-focused (e.g. Fathom) analytics platforms? [experiment]

analysis.name: Fathom Analytics
analysis.tagline: A Google Analytics alternative that's simple & privacy-first
analysis.value_proposition: Privacy-first, cookie-free web analytics that's simple to set up, GDPR-compliant, and shows only real human traffic without slowing down your site.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious website owners, developers, agencies, and content creators who want simple, GDPR-compliant analytics without the complexity or invasiveness of Google Analytics

features.name: cookie-free tracking
features.description: Tracks visitors without using cookies, eliminating the need for cookie consent banners
features.evidence_quote: Fathom anonymizes IP addresses and other visitor data without using cookies

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: Fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, ePrivacy, PECR privacy regulations
features.evidence_quote: fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, ePrivacy, PECR and more

features.name: ip anonymization
features.description: Anonymizes visitor IP addresses to protect privacy
features.evidence_quote: Fathom anonymizes IP addresses and other visitor data

features.name: single-line script install
features.description: One line of code embeds Fathom on any site, CMS, or framework
features.evidence_quote: Our script is a single line of code that works with any website, CMS or framework

features.name: real-time analytics
features.description: See dashboard fill up in real time as visits happen
features.evidence_quote: start collecting real-time data without prior technical knowledge

features.name: bot detection
features.description: Blocks bots, scrapers, and spam traffic to show only real human visits
features.evidence_quote: Our real-time analytics blocks bots, scrapers and spam traffic—showing you only real, human visits

features.name: advanced bot blocking
features.description: New layer of sophisticated bot protection to keep analytics accurate
features.evidence_quote: New layer of sophisticated bot protection launched to keep your analytics human and accurate

features.name: bot banning
features.description: Additional bot detection layer for cleaner data
features.evidence_quote: A new layer of bot detection to keep your analytics accurate and free from non-human traffic

features.name: event tracking
features.description: Custom events to track sign-ups, clicks, and ecommerce sales
features.evidence_quote: Use custom events to collect user interactions like newsletter sign-ups, link + button clicks or ecommerce sales

features.name: ecommerce tracking
features.description: Track ecommerce conversions and sales as events
features.evidence_quote: Ecommerce/event tracking included

features.name: email reports
features.description: Weekly or monthly automated email reports of metrics
features.evidence_quote: Send email reports every week or month so that you can keep track of your metrics without logging in

features.name: utm campaign tracking
features.description: Track UTMs to measure campaign traffic and conversion to revenue
features.evidence_quote: Use UTMs to collect data on how much traffic your campaigns generate

features.name: forever data retention
features.description: Data kept indefinitely — 20+ years of retention
features.evidence_quote: That means 20 years from now, customers can still see their data from the day they first started using our software

features.name: lightweight script
features.description: Fast-loading script that doesn't hurt SEO or site performance
features.evidence_quote: Our script is lightweight and fast-loading, meaning switching from Google Analytics to Fathom won't hurt your SEO

features.name: traffic spike handling
features.description: Infrastructure handles viral or influencer traffic without slowdown
features.evidence_quote: If an A-list influencer shares your site on social media or your blog post goes viral, your analytics won't slow down

features.name: api access
features.description: REST API for programmatic access to analytics data
features.evidence_quote: API access

features.name: api rate limit upgrades
features.description: Self-serve API plans starting at $19/mo for higher rate limits and concurrency
features.evidence_quote: You can now upgrade your API plan for higher rate limits and more concurrency, with self-serve plans from $19/mo

features.name: saved views
features.description: Save most-used filter combinations and switch between them in one click
features.evidence_quote: Save your most-used filter combinations and switch between them in a single click

features.name: advanced filters
features.description: Build and apply multiple filters at once to segment data
features.evidence_quote: Advanced Filters lets you build and apply multiple filters at once

features.name: regex filters
features.description: Regex pattern-based filtering for precise segmentation
features.evidence_quote: RegEx matching in Advanced Filters gives you powerful pattern-based filtering capabilities

features.name: entry and exit pages
features.description: See where visitors land on and exit from your site
features.evidence_quote: See where visitors land when they arrive at your site and where they leave from

features.name: google search console integration
features.description: See which search terms drive traffic directly in Fathom dashboard
features.evidence_quote: See which search terms people use to find your site in search results, right inside your Fathom dashboard

features.name: enhanced data export
features.description: Customizable exports with dimensions, metrics, date groupings, and preview
features.evidence_quote: complete control over your analytics exports with customisable dimensions, metrics, date groupings

features.name: dashboard download
features.description: Download entire dashboard as a zip of CSVs with one click
features.evidence_quote: Download your entire dashboard as a zip of CSVs with one click

features.name: unlimited data exports
features.description: Export data without limits
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited data exports

features.name: unlimited email reports
features.description: Send unlimited email reports across your account
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited email reports

features.name: self-serve site transfer
features.description: Transfer sites to other Fathom users without contacting support
features.evidence_quote: Transfer sites to other Fathom users yourself, without needing to contact support

features.name: chart milestones
features.description: Visual markers on charts to see impact of website changes
features.evidence_quote: Add milestones to your charts to see how changes to your website impact pageviews and events

features.name: referrer favicons
features.description: Favicons visible in the Referrers box
features.evidence_quote: Favicons are now visible in the Referrers box

features.name: city data
features.description: See exact cities where visitors come from with dedicated tab
features.evidence_quote: City data lets you see exactly which cities your visitors are coming from

features.name: region data
features.description: Drill down from countries to states/provinces of visitors
features.evidence_quote: Region data lets you drill down from countries to see states, provinces

features.name: operating system data
features.description: See which operating systems visitors are using
features.evidence_quote: Operating System data (found in the Device Types box) shows you which operating systems your visitors are using

features.name: traffic sources
features.description: See where traffic comes from with source-level attribution
features.evidence_quote: Sources found in the Referrers box describe where traffic to your website comes from

features.name: details view
features.description: See more details and rows for every box on dashboard
features.evidence_quote: The newest feature in Fathom is called Details, and it's accessible via the button that looks like a list

features.name: google analytics importer
features.description: Import historical data from Google Analytics
features.evidence_quote: Google Analytics Importer

features.name: shareable dashboards
features.description: Share a dashboard publicly or with clients
features.evidence_quote: Share a dashboard

features.name: all sites view
features.description: View across all sites in one aggregated view
features.evidence_quote: All sites view

features.name: multi-domain tracking
features.description: Track multiple domains under a single site ID
features.evidence_quote: Multi-domains

features.name: multiple site ids
features.description: Use multiple site IDs on one website
features.evidence_quote: Multiple site IDs with one website

features.name: eu isolation
features.description: Route EU visitor data through EU-only infrastructure
features.evidence_quote: EU isolation

features.name: site firewall settings
features.description: Firewall rules to control which requests are collected
features.evidence_quote: Site firewall settings

features.name: exclude own visits
features.description: Filter out your own visits from analytics data
features.evidence_quote: Exclude your own visits

features.name: block local/test environments
features.description: Prevent local dev/test traffic from polluting data
features.evidence_quote: Blocking local/test environments

features.name: two-factor authentication
features.description: 2FA for account security
features.evidence_quote: Two-factor authentication

features.name: 404 page tracking
features.description: Track 404/error pages as conversion events
features.evidence_quote: Track 404/error pages

features.name: form submission tracking
features.description: Track form submissions as conversion events
features.evidence_quote: Track form submissions

features.name: external link click tracking
features.description: Track clicks on outbound external links
features.evidence_quote: Track external link clicks

features.name: link click tracking
features.description: Track clicks on links as events
features.evidence_quote: Track link clicks

features.name: page load conversion tracking
features.description: Track page loads as conversion events
features.evidence_quote: Track page load conversions

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Keyboard shortcuts for faster dashboard navigation
features.evidence_quote: Using keyboard shortcuts

features.name: partners program
features.description: 25% lifetime affiliate commissions with source keywords and Partners dashboard
features.evidence_quote: Earn 25% lifetime commissions with source keywords, flexible payouts, and a new Partners dashboard

features.name: live demo dashboard
features.description: Public live demo dashboard to explore before signing up
features.evidence_quote: View a live demo

features.name: utm/referrer attribution for events
features.description: Attribute event completions back to UTMs and referrers
features.evidence_quote: UTM/Referrer attribution improvements for event completions

features.name: date-range data export
features.description: Export data for a specific date or date range
features.evidence_quote: Export data by date

features.name: hide refs tab
features.description: Site config option to hide the Referrers tab
features.evidence_quote: You can now hide the Refs tab, change the event conversion formula and sort sites by name

features.name: custom event conversion formula
features.description: Configure how event conversions are calculated
features.evidence_quote: change the event conversion formula

features.name: faster dashboard engine
features.description: Rebuilt analytics engine — everything loads faster
features.evidence_quote: We rebuilt the analytics engine behind your Fathom dashboard from the ground up. Everything loads faster

features.name: enterprise-grade infrastructure
features.description: Enterprise-grade hosting infrastructure for reliability
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-grade infrastructure

features.name: 100% data ownership
features.description: Customer owns 100% of their analytics data
features.evidence_quote: 100% data ownership

features.name: email support
features.description: Email-based customer support (no phone/calls)
features.evidence_quote: Amazing email support

features.name: multi-site support
features.description: 50+ sites included per plan, scaling with tier
features.evidence_quote: 50 sites included (more on bigger plans)

features.name: affiliate/referral urls
features.description: Personal affiliate URL to generate revenue from referrals
features.evidence_quote: using your affiliate URL to generate revenue

features.name: dpa (data processing agreement)
features.description: DPA available for GDPR-compliant customers
features.evidence_quote: Do I need to sign the DPA?

differentiators: Cookie-free with no consent banner required
Single line of code, works with any framework
Real human traffic only — bots blocked
No sales, no discounts — everyone pays the same fair price
Trusted by IBM, GitHub, Tailwind and over a million websites

praised: 'Wow, what a breath of fresh air. I love how simple Fathom is' — Joel Gascoigne, CEO of Buffer
'A must have tool if you want to understand what's happening with your website traffic—it's simple, speedy, and accurate' — Ruben Gamez
'Such a pleasure to use compared to Google Analytics. There's just the right number of features, and their platform is incredibly intuitive' — Ian Mackey, Huberman Lab
'An ethical analytics tool that I trust' — Charli Marie, ConvertKit
Praised for simplicity, speed, privacy focus, and not slowing down sites (better SEO)
complaints: HN thread claim: 'Plausible and Fathom analytics are not GDPR compliant' — challenges to their compliance claims
No live demos or sales calls offered — some prospects want them
No free tier (only 7-day trial); founder addresses this as sustainability choice
Starts at $15/month — pricier than free alternatives
No sales/discounts ever, including Black Friday

free_tier.limits: 7-day free trial only, no permanent free tier

tiers.name: Up to 100,000 pageviews
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50 sites, ecommerce/event tracking, API access, all core features

pricing.notes: Pageview-based (not seat-based) pricing. Yearly billing gets 2 months free (~17% off). Extra sites in packs of 50 for $10/month or $100/year. No free tier — only 7-day trial. No discounts, sales, or Black Friday deals ever. Auto-upgrades if pageview cap exceeded 2 months in a row. Optional API upgrades from $19/mo for higher rate limits.

recent_hn.title: Show HN: Boatswain, A macOS menu bar app for Fathom Analytics
